notes: Automatic WCK2CK sync-off delay from write class commands.
Automatic WCK2CK sync-off delay from read class commands.
Another WCK2CK sync start cannot be executed while WCK2CK sync status is on.
Normal WR to RD path requires new WCK2CK sync start.
CAS WS=0 and WS_OFF=0 extends WCK sync-off when MR26.OP[3]=1.

CAS WSOE command must be issued before RL from previous read class command.
